_readme: Dynamic Copy Matrix. Uses Spintax {A|B|C} for programmatic generation. Variables to be injected: {city_name}, {niche_name}, {service_name}, {sv_action}, {sv_identity}, {sv_output}, {sv_proof}, {sv_clientwin}, {keyword}, {sv_tools}.

common.feat_headline: {A platform built to grow your operations.|Websites that actually deliver results.|A digital presence that prints money.|Turn your website into your best salesperson.|Digital assets engineered for measurable growth.}
common.feat_subline: {We don't use confusing tech jargon.|We skip the developer fluff.|No vanity metrics, just real results.} As your {service_name}, we just {sv_action} pages that {help you capture attention|turn casual visitors into loyal clients|convert traffic into actual revenue}.
common.f1_desc: We craft content that speaks directly to your ideal clients. No jargon. Just clear, compelling reasons to choose you over everyone else.
common.f2_desc: We strategically highlight your reviews, your past work, and your compliance details so people feel 100% secure spending their money with you.
common.f3_desc: Direct WhatsApp links, tap-to-call buttons, and highly optimized short forms that actually convert visitors into qualified leads.
common.f4_desc: We make sure your pages load instantly on any connection—from 3G to 5G—keeping mobile visitors engaged and preventing bounce rates.
common.f5_desc: We build your site exactly the way Google's algorithms like it. This ensures you get discovered for the most profitable {niche_name} searches in {city_name}.
common.f6_desc: Over 80% of your audience visits via smartphones. We architect your platform to look and function stunningly on every screen size.
common.faq1_q: {I don't have a website yet. Where do we start?|What is the first step for a new website?|I'm starting from scratch, how does this work?}
common.faq1_a: We handle the entire process end-to-end. As your {service_name}, we will secure your domain name, set up your premium hosting, write the copy, and build the entire site. You just sit back and review.
common.faq2_q: {How much does a new website cost?|How expensive is a custom website?|What is the pricing structure?}
common.faq2_a: It depends entirely on your operational needs—whether you need a simple lead-gen page or a complex B2B portal. Use the pricing calculator above for an instant estimate, or contact us for a detailed brief.
common.faq3_q: {How long does it take?|How fast can you build my website?|What is the turnaround time?}
common.faq3_a: Usually between 7 to 14 days for standard deployments. We move incredibly fast, but we have strict QA processes to ensure we never sacrifice quality.
common.faq4_q: {I already have an Instagram page. Do I really need this?|Is social media enough?|Can't I just use Facebook and WhatsApp?}
common.faq4_a: Social media is for discovery; a website is for closing. You don't own your Instagram page, and high-paying clients want to see a structured, corporate platform before committing funds. A website makes you look like a highly credible, trusted institution.
common.faq5_q: {What if I don't know anything about tech?|Is it hard to manage?|Do I need to hire an IT person?}
common.faq5_a: That is exactly why we are here. You don't need to know a single line of code. We build it to be incredibly easy for you to manage, and we provide ongoing support, explaining everything in plain English.
common.faq6_q: {Do you help with Google ranking?|Will people actually find my website?|Is SEO included?}
common.faq6_a: Absolutely. Every platform we build includes foundational technical SEO specifically optimized for the {city_name} market, ensuring you show up when local clients search for your services.
common.cta_aspiration: {You do great work. Now get a website that proves it.|It's time to claim your space online.|Upgrade your digital presence today.|Stop losing clients to inferior competitors.}
common.trust_signal: {Trusted by smart leaders in {city_name}.|Partnering with top organisations in {city_name}.|The chosen {service_name} for {city_name} innovators.|Delivering digital excellence across {city_name}.}
common.guarantee_desc: {We don't launch until you are 100% satisfied with the digital asset we've built.|We stand by our work. If it doesn't function exactly as scoped, we fix it at zero extra cost.}
